description: You are an entertainment entrepreneur converting a residential building shell into 'The Blue Note Lounge', an intimate live music jazz club. Transform the space into a functional venue by constructing at least 3 partition walls to separate private zones from public areas and defining at least 4 room zones with descriptive names or distinct floor colors. Furnish the Stage with at least 1 piano and 2 stools/chairs, the Green Room with at least 1 sofa or armchair, the Audience Area with at least 15 tables and 30 chairs, the Bar with at least 3 counters and 6 bar stools, and the Restrooms with at least 2 toilets and 2 sinks. Generate a 3D photo rendering of the space and save it to /home/ga/Desktop/jazz_club_render.png. Save the project file when finished.
